name: Jane Doe

raw.name: Jane Doe
raw.title: Senior Software Engineer at Acme Corp
raw.bio: Software engineer with 8 years of experience building distributed systems and developer tooling. Passionate about developer experience and platform reliability.
raw.skills: Distributed Systems, Python, Go, Kubernetes, Platform Engineering
raw.experience:
- Acme Corp (2020 - Present): Senior Software Engineer
- Startup Inc (2018 - 2020): Software Engineer
- Big Tech Co (2016 - 2018): Junior Engineer
raw.achievements: Reduced p99 API latency by 40% through query optimization and caching. Led migration of monolith to microservices serving 10M+ users.
raw.communicationStyle: Direct and concise. Prefers async communication with clear action items. Uses diagrams to explain complex systems.
raw.verbalQuirks:
Starts answers with 'So..'
Uses 'to be clear' before important points
Asks clarifying questions before diving in
Ends explanations with 'does that track?'
